issues.title: UX: Dashboard has horizontal overflow on mobile viewport
issues.description:
Validated in production (`https://auto-service-foundation.onrender.com/`) with Playwright at `390x844`: `innerWidth=390`, `scrollWidth=824`, `hasOverflow=true`.

Observed impact:
- Horizontal scrolling is required on the dashboard.
- Header actions and summary cards are visually clipped on the right edge.

Repro steps:
1. Open `/` on mobile viewport width 390.
2. Check `document.documentElement.scrollWidth > window.innerWidth`.
3. Observe clipped UI and horizontal scroll.

Acceptance criteria:
- At 390px width, dashboard reports no document-level horizontal overflow.
- Header action group wraps or stacks without clipping.
- Summary/queue cards remain fully visible without sideways scroll.

issues.title: UX: Active work-orders queue table overflows on mobile viewport
issues.description:
Validated in production (`https://auto-service-foundation.onrender.com/work-orders/active`) with Playwright at `390x844`: `innerWidth=390`, `scrollWidth=732`, `hasOverflow=true`.

Observed impact:
- Table layout exceeds viewport width.
- Users need horizontal scroll to read queue rows.

Repro steps:
1. Open `/work-orders/active` on mobile viewport width 390.
2. Check `document.documentElement.scrollWidth > window.innerWidth`.
3. Observe overflow in queue table.

Acceptance criteria:
- At 390px width, page has no document-level overflow.
- Queue remains readable on mobile (stacked cells, priority columns, or controlled horizontal table container).
- Core fields (`–Ъ–Њ–і`, `–°—В–∞—В—Г—Б`, `–Ъ–ї–Є–µ–љ—В`) are immediately visible without horizontal scroll.

issues.title: UX: Work-order status history shows raw ISO timestamps
issues.description:
Validated on production work-order page (`/work-orders/wo-1002`): history table renders timestamps as raw ISO (`2026-03-22T21:10:49.778Z`) instead of localized operator-friendly format.

Observed impact:
- Operators must mentally parse UTC ISO strings.
- Time context is harder during dispatch and shift handoffs.

Repro steps:
1. Open `/work-orders/wo-1002`.
2. Scroll to `–Ш—Б—В–Њ—А–Є—П —Б—В–∞—В—Г—Б–Њ–≤`.
3. Observe raw ISO timestamp formatting.

Acceptance criteria:
- History time displays in localized Russian human-readable format (e.g. `22.03.2026, 21:10`).
- Exact absolute time remains unambiguous (tooltip/full value is acceptable).
